rationale: Gov't Code §2306.151 governs TDHCA bond proceeds targeting for low-income families; it does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The board shall have the specific duty and power to adopt a target strategy for the percentage of mortgage revenue bond proceeds to be made available to individuals and families of low and very low income.
_note: No textual or operational linkage between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this rule.
